summary: SEO SILO Architecture Testing - All 6 SILO pages verified working correctly with proper hero colors, CTAs navigating to /register, English alias routes functional, Footer with SEO categories (Seguridad/Familia), and sitemap.xml includes all new URLs.
verified_features: SILO /proteccion-phishing loads with RED hero gradient, H1 includes 'Phishing', CTA navigates to /register
SILO /proteccion-fraude-online loads with ORANGE hero gradient, H1 includes 'Fraude Online', CTA to /register
SILO /seguridad-digital-familiar loads with PURPLE/INDIGO hero gradient, H1 includes 'Familia', CTA to /register
SILO /proteccion-identidad-digital (NEW) loads with EMERALD hero gradient, H1: 'Protección de Identidad Digital', CTA to /register
SILO /seguridad-mayores (NEW) loads with ROSE/PINK hero gradient, H1: 'Seguridad Digital para Nuestros Mayores', CTA to /register
SILO /estafas-bancarias (NEW) loads with BLUE hero gradient, H1: 'Protección contra Estafas Bancarias', CTA to /register
Footer shows 'Seguridad' category with links: Protección Phishing, Fraud Prevention, Estafas Bancarias, Identidad Digital, Pagos Seguros
Footer shows 'Familia' category with links: Seguridad Familiar, Seguridad Mayores, Localizador GPS, Botón SOS
sitemap.xml includes all SILO URLs with Spanish and English versions and proper priority settings (0.95 for main, 0.85 for alias)
All CTAs with data-testid attributes work correctly: cta-protect-identity, cta-protect-elderly, cta-banking-protection

frontend.proteccion_phishing_page: PASSED - H1: Protección contra Phishing, Hero: red gradient
frontend.proteccion_fraude_online_page: PASSED - H1: Protección contra Fraude Online, Hero: orange gradient
frontend.seguridad_digital_familiar_page: PASSED - H1: Seguridad Digital para Toda tu Familia, Hero: indigo gradient
frontend.proteccion_identidad_digital_page: PASSED - H1: Protección de Identidad Digital, Hero: emerald gradient
frontend.seguridad_mayores_page: PASSED - H1: Seguridad Digital para Nuestros Mayores, Hero: rose gradient
frontend.estafas_bancarias_page: PASSED - H1: Protección contra Estafas Bancarias, Hero: blue gradient
frontend.footer_seguridad_category: PASSED - Shows links to SILO security pages
frontend.footer_familia_category: PASSED - Shows links to family security pages
frontend.sitemap_includes_silo_urls: PASSED - All 6 SILO pages + aliases included

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 new SILO pages follow consistent architecture pattern with proper Helmet SEO meta tags
All pages use data-testid attributes for CTAs enabling automated testing
Internal linking between SILO pages is implemented correctly for SEO
Hero sections use appropriate Tailwind gradient classes (from-emerald, from-rose, from-blue)
LandingFooter.jsx correctly separates links into 'Seguridad' and 'Familia' categories for SEO
sitemap.xml properly prioritizes Spanish URLs (0.95) over English aliases (0.85)
seed_data_creation: No seed data required for SILO page testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO SILO architecture fully implemented. 6 SILO pages: /proteccion-phishing (red), /proteccion-fraude-online (orange), /seguridad-digital-familiar (purple), /proteccion-identidad-digital (emerald), /seguridad-mayores (rose), /estafas-bancarias (blue). All have English aliases. Footer has Seguridad and Familia categories with internal links. sitemap.xml updated.
notes: Minor console errors (Failed to fetch for reviews/stats/auth) are non-blocking as they relate to unauthenticated landing page requests. The SILO pages themselves work correctly.
